The abstract on page 2 states: 'Abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone (AAP) previously demonstrated improved survival in STAMPEDE... Standard-of-care (SOC) was androgen deprivation therapy.' It further clarifies on page 3 under 'What's new?' that the study is about 'adding abiraterone acetate and prednisone (AAP) to androgen deprivation therapy'.
